title: manilkara excelsa
intro: Manilkara excelsa, also known as the balata or Manilkara tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Manilkara excelsa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Manilkara excelsa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
